name: luk-platform
description: LUK platform for digital raffles in Argentina

scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:frontend: cd frontend && (npm rebuild esbuild >/dev/null 2>&1 || true) && if [ "$(uname -m)" = "arm64" ] && [ -d node_modules/@esbuild/darwin-x64 ] && [ ! -d node_modules/@esbuild/darwin-arm64 ]; then arch -x86_64 npm run test:unit -- --run; else npm run test:unit -- --run; fi
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.docker:db:push: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npx prisma db push
scripts.docker:db:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run db:seed
